title: Hiring Financial Analyst at Axis Bank Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Hiring Financial Analyst at Axis Bank Asia Pacific Associates
jsonLd.description:
Axis Bank Asia Pacific Associates invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Financial Analyst at our Raipur location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Axis Bank Asia Pacific Associates:
Axis Bank Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Budgeting

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Axis Bank Asia Pacific Associates!
